static_cases.code:
tmp = decode(blob)
return {'description': tmp + description, 'snippet': tmp + snippet}

_emit_block = ('no specific', 'no evidence')
desc = re.sub('no evidence', '', lead.get('description'))

query = intent or 'hiring funding expansion'
terms = 'hiring, funding, expansion'
